message:
chore(deps,beads): refresh Cargo.lock and sync issue tracker state

Regenerates lockfile from dependency changes and syncs the beads issue
database with latest status updates from concurrent agent work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
